scripts.sync-sitemaps: curl -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap.xml -o public/sitemap.xml && curl -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-static.xml -o public/sitemap-static.xml && curl -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-stores.xml -o public/sitemap-stores.xml && curl -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-products.xml -o public/sitemap-products.xml && curl -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-users.xml -o public/sitemap-users.xml && curl -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-posts.xml -o public/sitemap-posts.xml && curl -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-jobs.xml -o public/sitemap-jobs.xml && curl -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-templates.xml -o public/sitemap-templates.xml && curl -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-pages.xml -o public/sitemap-pages.xml && curl -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-tags.xml -o public/sitemap-tags.xml && curl -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-images.xml -o public/sitemap-images.xml && curl -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-comments.xml -o public/sitemap-comments.xml && curl -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/robots.txt -o public/robots.txt
scripts.sync-sitemaps-secure: curl -H "X-GitHub-Token: $MGZON_ACTIONS_TOKEN" -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap.xml -o public/sitemap.xml && curl -H "X-GitHub-Token: $MGZON_ACTIONS_TOKEN" -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-static.xml -o public/sitemap-static.xml && curl -H "X-GitHub-Token: $MGZON_ACTIONS_TOKEN" -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-stores.xml -o public/sitemap-stores.xml && curl -H "X-GitHub-Token: $MGZON_ACTIONS_TOKEN" -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-products.xml -o public/sitemap-products.xml && curl -H "X-GitHub-Token: $MGZON_ACTIONS_TOKEN" -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-users.xml -o public/sitemap-users.xml && curl -H "X-GitHub-Token: $MGZON_ACTIONS_TOKEN" -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-posts.xml -o public/sitemap-posts.xml && curl -H "X-GitHub-Token: $MGZON_ACTIONS_TOKEN" -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-jobs.xml -o public/sitemap-jobs.xml && curl -H "X-GitHub-Token: $MGZON_ACTIONS_TOKEN" -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-templates.xml -o public/sitemap-templates.xml && curl -H "X-GitHub-Token: $MGZON_ACTIONS_TOKEN" -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-pages.xml -o public/sitemap-pages.xml && curl -H "X-GitHub-Token: $MGZON_ACTIONS_TOKEN" -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-tags.xml -o public/sitemap-tags.xml && curl -H "X-GitHub-Token: $MGZON_ACTIONS_TOKEN" -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-images.xml -o public/sitemap-images.xml && curl -H "X-GitHub-Token: $MGZON_ACTIONS_TOKEN" -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/sitemap-comments.xml -o public/sitemap-comments.xml && curl -H "X-GitHub-Token: $MGZON_ACTIONS_TOKEN" -fSL https://mgzon-server.hf.space/robots.txt -o public/robots.txt
